name: Operations/lookup-operation
description: CodeSystem $lookup conformance tests: lookup by system+code query parameters, the Parameters-wrapped coding variant, an unknown-code error path, and a missing-required-parameter error path (modeled on HAPI FHIR's CodeSystemR4Test). Gated on the target advertising CodeSystem/$lookup; exact display/designation content is warningOnly since terminology content is server-specific even when $lookup itself is supported.

test.name: $lookup by system+code query parameters
test.description: GET CodeSystem/$lookup?system=...&code=alpha must return a Parameters resource whose 'display' part echoes the code's display (warningOnly: exact display content is terminology-server-specific).

assert.description: Response must be a Parameters resource
Parameters should include a 'name' part echoing the code system's name (warningOnly)
Parameters 'display' part should equal 'Alpha Code' (warningOnly: exact display content is terminology-server-specific)

test.name: $lookup via Parameters-wrapped coding parameter (POST)
test.description: POST CodeSystem/$lookup with a coding Parameters body must return the same shape as the GET query-parameter form.

operation.description: POST CodeSystem/$lookup with a Parameters body (coding=beta)

assert.description: Response must be a Parameters resource
Parameters 'display' part should equal 'Beta Code' (warningOnly: exact display content is terminology-server-specific)

test.name: $lookup for an unknown code returns an error
test.description: GET CodeSystem/$lookup?system=...&code=<unknown> must be rejected (warningOnly: some servers return 404, others a 400/422 OperationOutcome).

assert.description: Should return an error status, commonly 404 (warningOnly: exact error status varies by server — some return 400/422 instead)
Response should be an OperationOutcome describing the unknown code (warningOnly)

test.name: $lookup missing required parameters returns 400
test.description: GET CodeSystem/$lookup with no system/code/coding must be rejected with 400.
